rules.desc: the first line must be `// name: news-app`
open with the Splash-local state object `let news_app = { detail: false selected: 0 }`
define fn show_story(i) for detail navigation
define fn show_list() to return to the feed
define and instantiate the StoryRow template for all seven feed rows
the feed rows live in a ScrollYView
bind live stories via sys.news across lead + 7 rows
the fixed shell is the 780-tall Overlay root
every row + masthead + lead needs a tap handler (>=9 on_click)
